title: dahlia purpurea var. rubra
intro: Dahlia purpurea var. rubra is a variety of flowering plant in the dahlia family, characterized by its deep red or reddish-purple flowers. The plant's roots, tubers, and flowers are used in herbal medicine, where they are valued for their potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Dahlia purpurea var. rubra is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
